nasb.text: But the things which God announced beforehand by the mouth of all the prophets, that His Christ would suffer, He has thus fulfilled.

esv.text: But what God foretold by the mouth of all the prophets, that his Christ would suffer, he thus fulfilled.

cnv.text: 但　神曾經藉著眾先知的口，預先宣告他所立的基督將要受害的事，就這樣應驗了。

ccb.text: 但是上帝早已借众先知预言基督要受害，这事果然应验了。

csbs.text: 但神藉着众先知的口所预言的，就是基督要受难的事，就这样应验了。
